switchVip.title: Switch Your VIP
switchVip.description: Use this dropdown to switch between your paired iCane devices. Each device is assigned to a specific VIP.

connectionStatus.title: Connection Status
connectionStatus.description: This badge shows whether your iCane is live and transmitting data. Green means connected - grey means the device is offline.

alerts.title: Alerts & Notifications
alerts.description: Tap the bell to view incoming alerts from your iCane - fall detection, low battery, emergency triggers, and more.

accountMenu.title: Your Account Menu
accountMenu.description: Access your profile, activity history, app settings, or sign out from this menu.

liveMap.title: Live Location Tracking
liveMap.description: See your iCane's real-time position on the map. Tap anywhere on the map to open routing options and set a destination for your VIP.

gpsInfo.title: GPS Signal Info
gpsInfo.description: Monitor the satellite count, signal quality, and last known GPS coordinates of your iCane device.

guardianNetwork.title: Guardian Network
guardianNetwork.description: See which co-guardians are currently online. Green means active - they're monitoring alongside you right now.

recentAlerts.title: Recent Alerts
recentAlerts.description: Stay updated with the latest fall detection and emergency alerts triggered by the iCane device.

sendNote.title: Send a Quick Note
sendNote.description: Send a short reminder or message directly to your VIP through the iCane's voice engine.

mapControls.title: Map Controls
mapControls.description: Lock the map to your VIP's route, follow their movement in real time, center on your own location, or zoom in and out using these controls.

devicesHeader.title: Your Paired iCane Devices
devicesHeader.description: All iCane devices linked to your account are shown here. You can manage, rename, or unpair any device.

addDevice.title: Add a New Device
addDevice.description: Tap 'Add Cane' and scan the QR code on your iCane to pair it with your account. It only takes a few seconds.

deviceActions.title: Open Device Actions
deviceActions.description: Click Manage on a device card to open quick actions for nickname, guardians, and pairing controls.

deviceMenu.title: Device Action Menu
deviceMenu.description: These options let you edit nickname, manage guardians, or unpair the device. Click Manage Guardians to continue.

inviteGuardian.title: Invite Another Guardian
inviteGuardian.description: Use this button to invite a new guardian by email so they can help monitor this VIP.

editGuardian.title: Edit Guardian Details
editGuardian.description: Use this edit icon on a guardian card to update relationship details when roles change.

guardianStats.title: Guardian Summary Stats
guardianStats.description: Track Total Guardians, currently Active guardians, and Pending Invites from these summary cards.

activityHeader.title: Activity Reports
activityHeader.description: A full audit trail of all account actions - logins, device changes, guardian invites, and more.

activitySearch.title: Search & Filter
activitySearch.description: Quickly find specific activities by searching for a guardian name, action type, or description.

deviceLogsHeader.title: Device Activity Logs
deviceLogsHeader.description: View route activities, safety events, and movement history for your VIP's iCane device.

deviceLogsSearch.title: Search and Filters
deviceLogsSearch.description: Quickly narrow records by keyword, status, or date range to find the events you need.

weatherMain.title: Weather Forecast
weatherMain.description: Check current conditions and multi-day forecasts to help plan safe outdoor activities for your VIP.

weatherSearch.title: Search Any Location
weatherSearch.description: Type any city or place in the Philippines to get a localized forecast for that area.

advancedHeader.title: Component Management
advancedHeader.description: Monitor real-time health of each hardware component and tweak sensor thresholds from here.

deviceStatus.title: Health at a Glance
deviceStatus.description: This panel summarizes how many components are online and gives an overall health percentage for your iCane.

headerMenuIntro.title: Open the Header Menu
headerMenuIntro.description: Open the Header Menu to access your connection status, VIP dropdown, and other settings.

dashboardPage.title: Live Location
dashboardPage.subtitle: Real-time monitoring and safety features for your iCane device

header.title: Manage Devices
header.subtitle: View and manage your paired canes, assign VIP profiles, and more.

unpair.title: Unpair Cane?
unpair.message: This will unpair and remove the cane from your account.

removeVip.title: Remove VIP Profile?
removeVip.message: This will remove the VIP profile assigned to this cane.

recommendation.heavyRain: Heavy rain or showers expected tomorrow. Better to stay indoors.
recommendation.sunny: It will be sunny tomorrow. Don't forget to bring an umbrella and stay hydrated.
recommendation.cloudy: It will be cloudy tomorrow. A good day for a walk.
recommendation.safeWalk: Tomorrow looks safe for a walk. Use your iCane as usual.

emergency.title: Emergency Alert
emergency.message: {{vipName}} triggered an emergency alert{{deviceLabel}}. Open Live Location now and contact the assigned emergency guardians immediately.

fall.title: Possible Fall Detected
fall.message: A possible fall was detected for {{vipName}}{{deviceLabel}}. Check the live map and confirm their condition as soon as possible.

arrival.title: Destination Reached
arrival.message: {{vipName}} has arrived at the selected destination{{deviceLabel}}. Route tracking has been cleared successfully.

storm.title: Severe Weather Warning
storm.message: Thunderstorm conditions were detected near {{location}}. Outdoor travel may be unsafe right now. Review the Weather Board before heading out.

wind.title: Strong Wind Advisory
wind.message: Strong winds of around {{windSpeed}} km/h were detected near {{location}}. Outdoor navigation may be unstable, so extra caution is advised.

termsModal.title: Terms and Privacy Policy

paragraphs.p1: By using, testing, or participating in the IoT-Enabled Smart Cane with AI-Based Visual Recognition and Route Navigation ("the System"), the user and/or their authorized guardian agrees to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
paragraphs.p2: The System is a research prototype designed to enhance the mobility, safety, and independence of visually impaired individuals. It is intended to assist navigation and hazard awareness but does not replace personal judgment, mobility training, or human assistance.
paragraphs.p3: The System utilizes short-range sensors, AI-based visual recognition, GPS tracking, route navigation, haptic feedback, and one-way voice alerts. Due to technical and environmental factors, the System may experience delays, inaccuracies, or service interruptions.
paragraphs.p4: Users acknowledge that obstacle detection is limited to sensor range, AI recognition may not be fully accurate, and GPS and navigation features depend on network availability and signal conditions. The System does not guarantee complete avoidance of hazards.
paragraphs.p5: Users must remain attentive at all times and are responsible for their own safety during navigation. Guardians or caregivers agree to use monitoring, messaging, and location features solely for safety and support purposes.
paragraphs.p6: The emergency SOS feature is intended to assist in emergency situations by sending alerts and location data to designated contacts. Successful delivery depends on mobile network coverage and sufficient SIM load. Immediate response is not guaranteed.
paragraphs.p7: Participation in system testing, surveys, and evaluations is voluntary. Participants may withdraw at any time without penalty. The system is not intended for commercial use.
paragraphs.p8: For data-related rights and processing details, please review the <link>Privacy Policy section</link>.

bullets.b1: Always prioritize real-world awareness while using the System.
bullets.b2: Treat all alerts as assistive guidance, not absolute guarantees.
bullets.b3: Use the device only for its intended research and safety support purpose.

paragraphs.p1: The System collects and processes personal data necessary for system functionality, safety monitoring, emergency response, and academic research purposes. Collected data may include GPS location, system usage logs, device identifiers, and guardian contact information.
paragraphs.p2: All personal data is processed in compliance with the Data Privacy Act of 2012 (Republic Act No. 10173). Reasonable organizational, physical, and technical security measures are implemented to protect collected data against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
paragraphs.p3: Location data is used to support route navigation, guardian monitoring, and emergency SOS alerts. Real-time tracking features require an active internet connection and may be limited in areas with weak or no network coverage.
paragraphs.p4: Collected data shall be retained only for the duration necessary to fulfill research objectives and system evaluation. Data used for analysis will be anonymized and aggregated to protect participant identity.
paragraphs.p5: Data subjects have the right to be informed, access, correct, object to processing, and withdraw consent regarding their personal data at any time by coordinating with the project researchers or system administrators.
paragraphs.p6: While reasonable safeguards are applied, no system can guarantee absolute data security. By using the System, users acknowledge and accept these inherent risks.

bullets.b1: We collect only data that is necessary for safety and system operation.
bullets.b2: Research reporting uses anonymized or aggregated data whenever possible.
bullets.b3: You may request to access or correct your data through project administrators.

termsModal.consentLabel: I confirm that the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy have been read and explained to me. I voluntarily consent to the collection and processing of my personal data and assume the risks associated with using this research prototype.
